title: Clone and study Rust terminal multiplexer projects
notes: Clone the source code of existing Rust terminal projects that do similar things to what we're building. Focus on: zellij (terminal multiplexer), wezterm (terminal emulator), rio (terminal emulator). Study their architecture for embedding terminals within a TUI. Save to references/existing-projects/

title: Research terminal emulation libraries in Rust
notes: Research and clone docs/code for Rust libraries that handle terminal emulation and PTY management. Focus on: portable-pty, vt100, termwiz, pty-process. Need to understand how to create a pseudo-terminal, run shell commands, and capture/render output. Save to references/terminal-emulation/

title: Research E2E testing strategies for TUI applications
notes: Figure out how agents can automatically test a TUI that requires user input and interaction. Research: expectrl, rexpect, termion testing, scripted terminal automation. Need to test in a real Apple terminal environment. The objectives explicitly say to figure this out BEFORE building the TUI. Save to references/tui-testing/

title: Research Rust TUI frameworks (ratatui, crossterm, cursive)
notes: Clone docs and example code for the main Rust TUI frameworks to understand their capabilities and trade-offs. Focus on: ratatui (most popular), crossterm (low-level), cursive (alternative). Save all docs and examples to references/tui-frameworks/
